items.title: Inside Revlon's comeback bet on fragrance with president Amber Garrison
items.summary: Revlon is betting big on fragrance as part of its highly-anticipated comeback plan after 2022 bankruptcy. The company is leveraging its iconic fragrance heritage (Charlie, Revlon Fire & Ice) to re-enter the North American beauty market.

items.title: Wellness Briefing: How stem cell therapy innovator Acorn Biolabs is legally scaling in the US
items.summary: Acorn Biolabs, a stem cell therapy innovator, is scaling in the US market. Represents premium wellness-beauty convergence trend in North America.

items.title: Beauty brands are lining up for the frozen yogurt craze
items.summary: Frozen yogurt (froyo) is back as the treat of summer 2026. Beauty brands are leveraging the trend - froyo-inspired skincare textures, probiotic-packed formulations, and dairy-adjacent ingredients are trending in North American beauty.

items.title: Fashion is now the largest category on Whatnot as brands flock to the platform
items.summary: Live shopping app Whatnot raised $225M. Fashion is its largest category. Beauty brands are also flocking to live shopping platforms - signals rising beauty live commerce in North America.

items.title: Nordstrom to Remove Props That Artist Claimed Were Knockoffs
items.summary: Nordstrom IP/retail news - less beauty relevant.

items.title: When Everything's Wellness, How Do Brands Compete?
items.summary: In 2026, the global wellness market is valued at $2T-$6T. Investors and brands debated at Beauty Independent's Dealmaker Summit: as wellness expands into every category, beauty brands must differentiate through clinical efficacy, science-backed claims, and authentic storytelling.

items.title: Ulta Beauty, Violet Grey And Printemps On Beauty Retail's Human Advantage In The Age Of AI
items.summary: Ulta Beauty, Violet Grey, and Printemps executives discussed how human curation and expert service remain beauty retail's competitive advantage over AI. AI is transforming product discovery and personalization, but in-store experience stays key for premium beauty in North America.

items.title: Clear Health Launches Topical Isotretinoin As Alternative To Oral Accutane
items.summary: Clear Health launched a topical isotretinoin product as an alternative to oral Accutane for acne treatment in the US. This signals growing demand for clinically-backed acne solutions and prescription-to-OTC crossover trend in North American skincare.

items.title: How Two Best Friends Are Bootstrapping Bur Bur To A Projected $20M In 2026 Sales
items.summary: Bur Bur, a bootstrapped indie beauty brand, projects $20M in 2026 sales without celebrity backing. Demonstrates strong indie beauty DTC momentum in North America - clean formulations and authentic founder stories driving growth.

items.title: After Ulta Rollout, Unite Hair Deepens Retail Push With Sephora Debut
items.summary: Unite Hair, after 20+ years in salons, is now expanding to Ulta and Sephora. Signals growing omnichannel retail opportunity for professional hair care brands in North America.

items.title: Marketplace Briefing: Shopify launches tools to help merchants track sales and traffic from AI platforms
items.summary: Shopify launching tools for merchants to track AI platform traffic (ChatGPT, Gemini, Copilot). Beauty DTC brands can now measure AI discovery impact on their North American sales.

items.title: 260 Sample Sale sees foot traffic jump as luxury customers seek value
items.summary: Premium/luxury sample sales are gaining traffic as North American consumers seek value without compromising quality. Relevant for premium beauty: value-seeking trend may benefit mid-tier beauty brands.

items.title: [深度研究] 美妆护肤·冻酸奶(froyo)趋势爆发：Kiehl's、Korres、Go Greek入场
items.summary: 2026夏季冻酸奶(froyo)成为北美最热美妆趋势：Kiehl's推出Go Greek合作款酸奶护肤产品，Korres等品牌跟进。核心成分：益生菌(probiotics)、乳酸(lactic acid)、酸奶提取物。价格带：$15-35。适合出海选品：益生菌护肤/probiotic skincare在美国消费者端热度极高，结合夏季场景营销效果佳。

items.title: [深度研究] Clear Health推出局部外用异维A酸(isotretinoin)，挑战口服Accutane市场
items.summary: Clear Health（获XRC Ventures投资）推出局部外用异维A酸(topical isotretinoin)，通过远程皮肤科(teledermatology)开方，提供比口服Accutane更温和的痤疮解决方案。北美痤疮(acne)产品市场：OTC与处方的边界正在模糊，强效临床祛痘产品需求强烈。出海机会：高端祛痘/控油产品、含水杨酸/AHA的功效护肤有显著选品机会。关键词：acne treatment, teledermatology, 功效护肤。

items.title: [深度研究] Revlon破产后押注香水品类复苏，北美香水市场机会
items.summary: Revlon在2022年破产后，选择以香水品类为复苏支点，押注北美香水消费浪潮。香水(fragrance)是当前北美美妆增速最快的子类之一，消费者从标准香水转向小众香、情绪香水(mood fragrance)、留香体露(body fragrance lotion)等叠香组合(fragrance layering)。出海机会：留香身体乳/香水礼盒/小众香，关注中端价格带($25-60)。

items.title: [深度研究] Bur Bur头皮护理品牌年销$20M，scalp care在北美持续爆发
items.summary: Bur Bur是自筹资金(bootstrapped)的头皮护理(scalp care)品牌，2026年预计销售额$20M，上架Revolve。头皮健康(scalp health)是继护肤后北美最热新品类：生发精华(hair growth serum)、头皮磨砂(scalp scrub)、防脱发(anti-hair loss)产品需求激增。出海机会：头皮护理/发际线护理产品，价格带$20-45。关键词：hair growth, scalp serum, scalp scrub, anti-shedding。
